name: collate
description: Collate packages a historical Chinese OCR workflow for Codex: scan cleanup, MinerU OCR, structured proofreading, diff review, and DOCX / WeChat export.

interface.shortDescription: OCR, proofread, and export historical Chinese papers.
interface.longDescription: Collate turns scanned historical Chinese papers into auditable working drafts and export-ready outputs. It bundles scan cleanup, OCR, proofreading, diff review, Word export, and WeChat formatting in one Codex-ready package.
defaultPrompt: Run the full collate workflow on this PDF and produce DOCX plus WeChat HTML outputs.
OCR this historical Chinese paper, generate a review checklist, and summarise the risky pages.
Compare raw OCR with final edits and generate an audit report before export.
